_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting privacy impact assessments (PIAs) and data protection impact assessments (DPIAs) for new data processing activities and AI systems.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Skill SP-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-004 (RC, cosine: 0.593), SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.586).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.7/10 (raw 0.673). Shared vocabulary: [assessments, impact, privacy]. NICE-only terms [conduct] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, ai, conducting, data, dpias, new] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.924, R=0.849). P exceeds R by 0.075 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Conduct privacy impact assessments" and "Skill in conducting privacy impact assessments (PIAs) and data protection impact" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.713 ≈ STS 0.673 (gap 0.040). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [assessments, impact, privacy] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.7%. Shared tokens: [assessments, impact, privacy]. NICE-only: [conduct]. WIDAI-only: [activities, ai, conducting, data, dpias, new].
